en.Name: QBZ-191 5.8x42mm Assault Rifle
en.Description: A neo-generation assault rifle alternates QBZ-95 by Chinese PLA, multiple optimizations have installed into an AR15-liked rifle to fit in uniqued 5.8x42mm cartridges and stated tactical scenes

en.Name: 5.8x42mm DBP-191
en.Description: An updated version from 5.8x42mm DBP-10, fast-burning powder made it suited with shorter barrels.

ch.Name: 5.8x42mm DBP-191
ch.Description: 在5.8x42mm DBP-10弹上进行优化的弹药，通过更换被甲降低了热散影响，速燃发射药的引入也使其更适于较短枪管

en.Name: 5.8x42mm DBU-141
en.Description: High-accuracy ammo for maskman and sniper rifles, also with better ballistic effects. However, its penetrating power has strong difference with reality,

ch.Name: 5.8x42mm DBU-141
ch.Description: 用于射手步枪和狙击步枪的高精度弹药，弹道更为平直且散布较低。但请注意！此弹的穿透表现和现实有大幅差异

en.Name: 5.8x42mm DVC-12
en.Description: Armor-piercer with a tungsten cardie core, specific-desighed warhead struture lowers probability of crush when penetrating.

ch.Name: 5.8x42mm DVC-12
ch.Description: 使用碳化钨弹芯的硬质穿甲弹，经过特殊设计的结构可以降低弹头侵彻时发生碎裂的概率
